name: Dutch Apple Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Grease and flour a 9-inch tart or pie pan.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine flour, sugar, and baking powder.
4. Cut in 1-1/2 tablespoons margarine using a pastry blender or 2 knives until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
5. Add egg whites, milk, and vanilla; beat until smooth.
6. Batter will be stiff. Spoon into prepared pan and spread to fit the pan.
7. Arrange apple slices, overlapping, in 2 concentric circles to cover the batter.
8. In a small bowl, combine 3 tablespoons sugar and cinnamon; sprinkle over apple slices.
9. Dot with 1/2 tablespoon margarine.
10. Bake for 30 minutes.
11. Cool for 10 minutes before serving.
Serving Information:
Calories: 183; Fat: 2 g
